_comment: Live Wire Sync Test Configuration Template
_usage: Copy this file and customize for your environment. Run: node scripts/lib/wire-test-config-loader.js template > my-config.json
_run_id_note: Auto-generated UUID for this test run. Do not set manually - will be replaced at runtime.
_timestamp_note: Auto-generated ISO 8601 timestamp. Do not set manually - will be replaced at runtime.
_sla_seconds_note: Maximum wait time per probe in seconds. Increase to 480+ for high-volume orgs with sync backlogs. Default: 240 (4 minutes).
_polling_interval_note: Time between polling checks in seconds. Lower = more API calls but faster failure detection. Default: 10.
_object_types_note: Which objects to test. Options: 'account' (Account/company), 'contact' (Contact/contact). Can test one or both.

account_selectors._example: Use a real Salesforce Account ID from your org
Domain name to match Account.Website or company.domain
UUID sync anchor if you already have records with Sync Anchors

_account_selectors_note: Specify which accounts/companies to test. Must provide at least one selector. Remove unused selector types above.
_sample_size_note: Maximum number of contacts per account to test (if object_types includes 'contact'). Default: 20.
_revert_changes_note: If true, revert Wire Test field changes after test completes. Sync Anchors are NEVER reverted. Default: true.
_dry_run_note: If true, preview operations without executing. Useful for understanding what the test will do. Default: false.

salesforce._orgAlias_note: Salesforce org alias from 'sf org list'. Can use environment variable or hardcode (e.g., 'production', 'sandbox').

hubspot._note: HubSpot configuration is read from environment variables (HUBSPOT_PRIVATE_APP_TOKEN). No additional config needed here.

output._generatePDF_note: Generate PDF report in addition to JSON and Markdown. Requires Chromium/Chrome. Default: true.
output._outputDir_note: Directory for generated reports. Will be created if it doesn't exist. Default: ./wire-test-reports

_advanced_options._note: Advanced options for customization. Most users should use defaults above.
_advanced_options._parallel_probe_limit_note: Maximum number of probes to run in parallel. Higher = faster but more API load. Default: 5.
_advanced_options._retry_attempts_note: Number of retry attempts for transient API errors. Default: 3.
_advanced_options._backfill_batch_size_note: Number of records to backfill Sync Anchors per batch. Salesforce max: 200. Default: 200.
_advanced_options._enable_contact_testing_note: If false, skip contact testing even if 'contact' is in object_types. Default: true.
_advanced_options._collision_detection_enabled_note: If false, skip collision detection phase. Default: true.
_advanced_options._skip_preflight_validation_note: If true, skip pre-flight checks (NOT RECOMMENDED). Default: false.

_example_minimal_config._comment: Minimal configuration example - only required fields

_example_high_volume_org._comment: Configuration for high-volume orgs with large sync backlogs

_troubleshooting.timeout_issues: Increase sla_seconds to 480+ for orgs with large sync backlogs
_troubleshooting.api_rate_limits: Reduce parallel_probe_limit to 2-3 if hitting rate limits
_troubleshooting.missing_fields: Run with --setup-only flag first to deploy fields/properties
_troubleshooting.collision_detected: Review deduplication guidance in report, use Former_SFDC_IDs__c tracking
_troubleshooting.connector_paused: Check HubSpot connector status and error logs
_troubleshooting.authentication_failed: Re-authenticate: sf org login web --alias <org> and verify HUBSPOT_PRIVATE_APP_TOKEN
